query:
SELECT id, externalId, name, businessName, status, serviceCount
FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%' OR name LIKE '%BLACK BEAUTY%' OR name LIKE '%KENSINGTON%'
   OR businessName LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%' OR businessName LIKE '%BLACK BEAUTY%' OR businessName LIKE '%KENSINGTON%'
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M17pEiktKAmnzx.5240b4750712 --database 4LVfr96qhVoYSkLinpTZkt --execute 
SELECT id, externalId, name, businessName, status, serviceCount
FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%' OR name LIKE '%BLACK BEAUTY%' OR name LIKE '%KENSINGTON%'
   OR businessName LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%' OR businessName LIKE '%BLACK BEAUTY%' OR businessName LIKE '%KENSINGTON%'
LIMIT 10;
